[    0.0 -     0.0] (0.0 s) :: Configure run and logs directory
[    0.0 -     0.0] (0.0 s) :: Configure simulator
[    0.0 -     0.0] (0.0 s) :: Setup TCP parameters
[    0.0 -     1.6] (1.6 s) :: Create initial single forwarding state
[    1.6 -     4.3] (2.7 s) :: Setup routing arbiter on each node
[    4.3 -     4.4] (0.1 s) :: Create initial single forwarding state
[    4.4 -     4.4] (0.0 s) :: Set first GSL interface bandwidth
[    4.4 -     4.4] (0.0 s) :: Read UDP burst schedule
[    4.4 -     4.4] (0.0 s) :: Remove previous UDP burst log files
[    4.4 -     4.4] (0.0 s) :: Setup UDP burst applications
[    4.4 -     4.4] (0.0 s) :: Whatever is between previous timestamp and the simulation run
[    4.4 -   111.8] (107.4 s) :: Run simulation
[  111.8 -   111.8] (0.0 s) :: Write UDP burst log files
[  111.8 -   111.9] (0.1 s) :: Destroy simulator
